title: crotalaria retusa var. indica
intro: Crotalaria retusa var. indica, also known as Indian rattle pod or Jeeraka, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria retusa var. indica include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to promote liver health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
